headline: Starmer to set out support plan for heating oil costs
deck: Households have faced a sharp rise in the cost of heating oil since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.
cnSummary: 英国首相斯塔默将制定供暖油成本支持计划。自美以伊朗冲突爆发以来，家庭取暖油成本急剧上升。政府计划出台措施帮助受影响的家庭应对能源成本压力。

headline: Ukraine's urgent fight on the financial frontline
deck: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.
cnSummary: 乌克兰正在财政战线上奋力应对。面对战争带来的经济困境，乌克兰急需从国际货币基金组织和欧盟获得关键资金支持，同时被迫提高税收以缓解财政压力。

headline: Firms to be paid to hire unemployed young people
deck: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.
cnSummary: 英国政府提出一项新提议，为雇用18-24岁失业年轻人的企业提供补助金。每雇用一名该年龄段的失业青年，企业可获得3000英镑补助。此举旨在有效解决青年失业问题。

headline: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
deck: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.
cnSummary: 泛欧游戏分级机构PEGI宣布新规：从6月起，含有抽奖箱机制的游戏将获得最低16岁年龄限制。此举旨在保护未成年人免受随机付费机制的影响，加强欧洲游戏内容监管。

headline: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
deck: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.
cnSummary: 剑桥大学研究人员首次发现，儿童AI玩具存在识别孩子情绪的缺陷，容易误读情感并做出不恰当反应。这项研究警示了AI儿童产品在情感识别方面的潜在风险。

headline: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
deck: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.
cnSummary: Grammarly因推出AI作者模仿工具遭到强烈反对后已将其撤下。该工具在未经作者同意的情况下，使用其名字和写作风格创建"AI角色"，引发创意工作者的批评和隐私担忧。

headline: 'A new norm': BBC visits Doha market starting to fill up again two weeks into Iran war
deck: The BBC's International News correspondent, Barbara Plett Usher, visits Doha's Souq Waqif market as strikes in the region continue.
cnSummary: 伊朗战争爆发两周后，BBC记者访问了卡塔尔多哈的瓦吉夫市场。尽管该地区仍在继续遭受轰炸，但市场已开始恢复人气，逐渐回到正常状态，反映了当地民众对局势的适应。

headline: How US groups are driving a new generation of anti-abortion activism in the UK
deck: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?
cnSummary: 美国反堕胎组织正在英国推动新一代反堕胎运动。这些组织以Charlie Kirk事件为契机，发起跨大西洋宣传活动。但分析人士认为，这一运动能否改变英国长期形成的支持堕胎权的共识仍存疑问。

headline: Trump signals possible delay to Beijing summit as U.S. pressures China to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
deck: The remarks came as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met his Chinese counterpart He Lifeng in Paris, paving the way for the summit scheduled for late March.
cnSummary: 特朗普暗示可能延迟北京峰会，同时美国施压中国帮助重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。此前美国财政部长贝森特在巴黎与中国副总理何立峰会面，为计划于三月底举行的峰会铺路。

headline: U.S. oil prices stay elevated as Trump threatens strikes on Iran's crude export facilities
deck: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.
cnSummary: 美国对伊朗霍尔木兹岛的打击和特朗普威胁攻击伊朗石油基础设施，导致美国油价维持高位。摩根大通认为这标志着中东冲突的重大升级。

headline: Why Trump has his sights on Iran's Kharg Island — and what it means for the oil market
deck: Trump's decision to order strikes on Kharg Island has pushed one of the world's most critical oil hubs into the center of the escalating U.S.-Iran conflict.
cnSummary: 特朗普下令对伊朗霍尔木兹海峡附近的哈尔克岛进行打击，这一决定使全球重要石油枢纽成为美伊冲突的焦点。此举可能对全球油市造成重大影响，加剧地缘政治紧张局势。

headline: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s early year economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
deck: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
cnSummary: 中国今年经济增长目标定为4.5%-5%，为近30年来最低。当前经济动力主要来自假日消费和出口需求，但伊朗局势等地缘政治风险可能成为下行压力。
